description: An agent must generate structured meeting minutes from a raw audio transcript of a client meeting.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the transcript to identify the attendees, agenda items discussed, and key decisions made.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly extracts the key components of the meeting.

nodes.task_description: Identify all action items mentioned, including who is responsible and the due date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies and assigns all action items.

nodes.task_description: Format the extracted information into a standard meeting minutes template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a well-structured document with sections for attendees, decisions, and action items.
